items.raw_desc: Kamerarendszer HiLook IKS-2044BPH-PH/W:​​​​​​​​​​The HiLook IKS-2044BPH-PH/W is a set of recording equipment with one bullet camera and one turret camera. It includes an NVR 104MH-D/4P unit for 4 IP cameras that can handle combinations of different resolutions up to 6 Mpx and bitrates up to 20 Mbps (20 Mbps outbound). An SD card slot is available for up to 512 GB and connectivity is via RJ-45 port or wirelessly using Wi-Fi technology. The Bullet IP camera offers high quality images even at night thanks to IR illumination up to 30 m away. The Turret IP camera also guarantees high quality video at night thanks to IR and LED illumination up to 25 m away. The camera can be rotated 345° and tilted up to 80°. Both cameras have a resolution of 4 megapixels and a 1/2.7" CMOS sensor with a resolution of 2,560 × 1,440 pixels. They also offer a microphone and speaker for two-way communication and are weatherproof according to IP66 certification.
